LanguageData.EM_NexusSpine_RangedAdaptation.label: nexus ranged calibration
LanguageData.EM_NexusSpine_RangedAdaptation.descripti:
The adaptive nexus spine detects a ranged weapon and continuously recalibrates posture, recoil compensation, and visual-motor timing.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.EM_NexusSpine_GeneAdaptation.label: nexus gene resonance
LanguageData.EM_NexusSpine_GeneAdaptation.description:
The adaptive nexus spine resonates with strong fast-twitch melee genes and pushes close-quarters biomechanics to a higher output band.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.EM_AdaptiveNexusSpine.label: adaptive nexus spine
LanguageData.EM_AdaptiveNexusSpine.description:
This spine permanently distributes physical and biological transcendence channels as its baseline. Linked effects switch by state: adaptive armor below 75% health, nanite battle protocol in combat, ranged calibration with ranged weapons, and gene resonance with strong melee genes.
-- easyrim
